title: koompassia excelsa
intro: Koompassia excelsa, also known as the Borneo ironwood, is a large deciduous tree species native to the rainforests of Borneo. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Koompassia excelsa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Koompassia excelsa include extracts and infusions, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
